title: koeleria crassipes
intro: Koeleria crassipes, also known as tufted hair grass, is a perennial grass species native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria crassipes include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Koeleria crassipes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
